command: fabio lakehouse load-table --workspace $WS_ID --id $LH_ID --table sales_data --path Files/raw/sales_2024.csv --mode Overwrite --format Csv --header true --delimiter ","
description: Loads a file from the lakehouse Files area into a Delta table. Async job (fire-and-forget).
notes: Load-table is fire-and-forget (returns immediately). Only Csv and Parquet formats are supported (NOT JSON). Mode values: Overwrite, Append (PascalCase). For Csv: include --header and --delimiter. For Parquet: omit header/delimiter (API rejects mixed options). Verify table creation with 'fabio lakehouse list-tables'.
